name: @dataprovider/staking-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the dataprovider_staking Solana program.

scripts.sync-idl: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const ifExists=process.argv.includes('--if-exists');const idlSrc='../target/idl/dataprovider_staking.json';const typesSrc='../target/types/dataprovider_staking.ts';if(!fs.existsSync(idlSrc)){if(ifExists){console.log('[sync-idl] target/ not present, using committed IDL (prod build)');process.exit(0);}else{console.error('[sync-idl] '+idlSrc+' not found. Run anchor build first.');process.exit(1);}}fs.mkdirSync('idl',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(idlSrc,'idl/dataprovider_staking.json');fs.copyFileSync(typesSrc,'src/idl-types.ts');console.log('[sync-idl] copied IDL + types from target/');" --
